<@109728183439327232> you do NOT play X with the same expectations as the rest of the franchise. It is NOT a story-first type of ordeal here. It is it's own type of monster

The main deal of the X is the WORLD, not even the worldbuilding, but Mira itself (name of the alien planet you are on). It is the game with the best exploration out of all the games, and the game with the biggest and most expansive world out there. It can even feel big while you are on your mech!

This is very much a "you make your own adventure" in the sense that you choose how to tackle it. There are 5 continents in the game (6 with the new Deluxe version I guess, I only played the Wii U OG version), and you could just... SWIM all the way to the highest level continents 10 hours in (may take an hour of swimming), but nothing will stop you. This is some of the freedom the game gives you, you can do many many things other Xenoblades do not allow you to do since the numbered titles are more rail-roaded. The number of things to find is so insane in this game that I was discovering NEW SECRET AREAS **900** hours in! 

It has my favorite atmosphere and combat amongst the games (even if this is subjective), and my favorite OST of all of them! It is *very* different from the numbered titles (as I have already told you) and this extends to the OST too! Shout-out to the area themes! They are so GOATED I GET HYPED THINKING ABOUT IT AAAHHHH

Walking into Oblivia for the first time, and seeing the giant arch, and with day OST being so incredible and giving that grand sense of adventure, is a moment I will never forget. No game has ever made me feel like how this game has made me feel, and I hope this changes one day

The STORY is a funny one, and why people dislike it a bit. Here's the secret, Dyss (or other readers): the main story? It is there, it is a set piece, it has epic moments, but that's it. This game has THE most expansive side-quest system I am aware of, and it is there that the amazing story is

This item is called **Origin Of Time**, it provides two main benefits:

**Full Refund**: Recovers all XP and materials you invested in the character you use it on.

**Duplicate Conversion**: Only for Standard Awakeners (not for Limited in the Standard pool or the starting SR Awakeners), converts all additional copies into Standard "selectors," which can subsequently be used to obtain or duplicate other Standard Awakeners of your choice (not Limited in Standard).

This process is also applicable to **Standard Wheels** (except the Limited in the Standard pool).

It is primarily obtained from the developers through special in-game mail during specific events, such as anniversaries or major updates. It is used for re-allocating resources to build a better team.
